qt.qss_container: background-color: rgba(252, 252, 252, 1.0); color: rgba(25, 25, 26, 1.0); border: 1.0px solid rgba(125, 122, 133, 1.0); border-radius: 12.0px
qt.qss_leaf: background-color: rgba(252, 252, 252, 1.0); color: rgba(25, 25, 26, 1.0); border: 1.0px solid rgba(125, 122, 133, 1.0); border-radius: 12.0px; padding: 16.0px 16.0px 16.0px 16.0px
